mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actual_amount), 0) FROM `bls_order` WHERE create_time >= #{date} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND store_id IN
#{storeId}
AND status = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bls_order` WHERE create_time >= #{date} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND store_id IN
#{storeId}
AND status = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bls_member_user` WHERE create_time >= #{date} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND store_id IN
#{storeId}
AND is_delete = 0

SELECT HOUR(create_time) as hour, COUNT(*) as orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(actual_amount), 0) as hourlyRevenue FROM `bls_order` WHERE create_time >= #{date} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND store_id IN
#{storeId}
AND status = 1 GROUP BY HOUR(create_time) ORDER BY hour

SELECT s.id as storeId, s.name as storeName, COUNT(o.id) as orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.actual_amount), 0) as totalRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) as customerCount FROM `bls_store` s LEFT JOIN `bls_order` o ON s.id = o.store_id AND o.create_time >= #{startDate} AND o.create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND o.status = 1 WHERE s.is_delete = 0
AND s.id IN
#{storeId}
GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC

SELECT pr.id as ruleId, pr.name as ruleName, COUNT(o.id) as usageCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.actual_amount), 0) as totalRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) as customerCount FROM bls_price_rule pr LEFT JOIN `bls_order` o ON pr.id = o.price_rule_id AND o.create_time >= #{startDate} AND o.create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND o.status = 1 WHERE pr.is_delete = 0
AND pr.store_id IN
#{storeId}
GROUP BY pr.id, pr.name ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC
